text:
port x11-toolkits/libdecor 
installed port built
/usr/local/lib/libdecor-0.so
/usr/local/lib/libdecor-0.so.0
/usr/local/lib/libdecor-0.so.0.100.1
port /devel/sdl20 
libdecor.so maybe mislabeled caused the dependency not to be met for given libdecor config selection  



cp /usr/local/lib/libdecor-0.so /usr/local/lib/libdecor.so fixed this


running FreeBSD-13.1-p5
